tool_args.label: Utica Avenue Improvements
tool_args.raw_text: Utica Avenue Improvements. Proposed loading and bus lane improvement. Corridor study.

payload.description: Proposed improvements on Utica Avenue including loading zone adjustments, bus lane relocation on southbound approach to Eastern Parkway, transit signal priority, signal timing improvements, left turn bays, and pedestrian safety improvements. Includes a corridor study from Carroll St. to Church Ave.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Utica Avenue Improvements
Proposed loading and bus lane improvement
Relocates bus lane to SB approach
Signal timing improvements for all traffic • Transit Signal Priority (TSP) for buses • Left turn bays to reduce blockages by turning vehicles • Pedestrian safety improvements
